name: Cheese-Garlic Biscuits (as Served at Red Lobs
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F (230°C).
2. In a large bowl, mix the baking mix, milk, and shredded cheddar cheese until a soft dough forms.
3. Beat the mixture vigorously for an additional 30 seconds.
4. Spoon the dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet, forming spoonfuls of dough.
5. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes, or until golden brown.
6. Mix the margarine and garlic powder together.
7. Brush the mixture over the warm biscuits before removing them from the cookie sheet.
8. Serve warm (approximately 10 to 12 biscuits).
